name: veena-client
description: Veena student tracker client (webpack + React + Tailwind)

scripts.build: PUBLIC_URL=/app/ API_BASE=/server/api/api webpack --mode production && cp public/client-package.json dist/ && cp public/manifest.webmanifest public/sw.js dist/ && cp public/landing.html public/landing-2.html public/landing-3.html public/landing-4.html public/landing-demo.html public/pricing.html dist/ && npx tailwindcss -c landing.tailwind.config.js -i src/landing.css -o dist/landing.css --minify && (cp public/logo.png public/logo.webp dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && mkdir -p dist/icons && cp public/icons/*.png dist/icons/ && (cp -R public/screenshots dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && node scripts/apply-brand.js && node scripts/gen-asset-manifest.js
scripts.build:netlify: node ../scripts/gen-config.js && PUBLIC_URL=/ webpack --mode production && cp public/client-package.json dist/ && cp public/manifest.webmanifest public/sw.js dist/ && cp public/landing.html public/landing-2.html public/landing-3.html public/landing-4.html public/landing-demo.html public/pricing.html dist/ && npx tailwindcss -c landing.tailwind.config.js -i src/landing.css -o dist/landing.css --minify && (cp public/logo.png public/logo.webp dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && mkdir -p dist/icons && cp public/icons/*.png dist/icons/ && (cp -R public/screenshots dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && node scripts/fix-landing-paths.js && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && node scripts/apply-brand.js && node scripts/gen-asset-manifest.js
scripts.build:catalyst-students-only: PUBLIC_URL=/app/ API_BASE=/server/students/api webpack --mode production && cp public/client-package.json dist/ && cp public/manifest.webmanifest public/sw.js dist/ && mkdir -p dist/icons && cp public/icons/*.png dist/icons/ && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
